product.name: Nilgiri Frost
product.description: A smooth and aromatic black tea from the misty hills of Nilgiri.
product.fullDescription: Grown at 2,000 metres in the Western Ghats, Nilgiri Frost is celebrated for its fragrant, full-bodied character. The golden liquor carries notes of malt and dark fruit, with a clean, brisk finish — perfect any time of day.
